Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Input Two parts of rules Normative Strict vs Desiderata Recommended and an Event Log containing three cases Case 1 Case 2 Case 3 Task Identify normative violations strict rules and explain why Identify desiderata violations recommended practices and clarify their severity suboptimal but not severe Suggest interpretations justifications for the behaviors where possible Output Format Structured analysis based on the provided text and table

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Rules Normative Process Behavior Start Application Received Sequence App Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant Conditional Finalize Docs if Approved Close Case Constraints Credit Check before Risk Assessment Risk Assessment before Loan Decision Inform Applicant after Loan Decision If Approved Finalize Docs before Close Case If Rejected NO Finalize Docs before Close Case Prohibitions Skipping steps reversing order finalizing docs after rejection closing without logic

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Rules Desiderata Timing Credit Check within 24h of App Received Timing Inform Applicant within 48h of Loan Decision Activity Follow up Call encouraged before Close Case Severity Not serious violations just suboptimal

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 0900 App Received 0930 Credit Check 30 mins later OK for 24h rule 1000 Risk Assessment After Credit Check OK 1100 Loan Decision Approved After Risk Assessment OK 1300 Inform Applicant After Decision OK 2 hours later OK for 48h rule 1330 Finalize Documentation Approved plus Before Close OK 1400 Close Case Follow up Call None Desiderata violation Normative Status Compliant Desiderata Status Violation No Follow up Call

Text: Case 2 0800 App Received 0820 Risk Assessment Before Credit Check NORMATIVE VIOLATION 0900 Credit Check After Risk Assessment NORMATIVE VIOLATION 0930 Loan Decision Rejected After Risk Assessment OK sequence wise but underlying data flawed 1000 Finalize Documentation Rejected plus Before Close NORMATIVE VIOLATION 1030 Close Case Normative Status Multiple Violations Order of Check Assessment Finalizing Docs on Rejection Desiderata Status Credit Check was 1 hour after App OK for 24h Inform Applicant missing entirely Normative violation not just desiderata No Follow up Call

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 0900 App Received 1000 Jan 14 Credit Check 2 days later DESIDERATA VIOLATION greater than 24h 1100 Jan 14 Risk Assessment After Check OK 1200 Jan 14 Loan Decision Approved After Assessment OK 1500 Jan 16 Inform Applicant 2 days plus 3 hours later DESIDERATA VIOLATION greater than 48h 0900 Jan 17 Finalize Documentation Approved plus Before Close OK 1000 Jan 17 Close Case Follow up Call None DESIDERATA VIOLATION Normative Status Compliant Sequence is correct logic is correct Desiderata Status Multiple Violations Timing on Check Timing on Inform No Follow up

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Structure Introduction Section 1 Normative Violations Strict Rules Focus on Case 2 Explain specific breaches Section 2 Desiderata Violations Recommended Focus on Case 1 and Case 3 Explain timing and missing optional steps Section 3 Interpretations Justifications Why might this happen Human error system glitch policy exceptions Conclusion Summary

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Refining Case 2 Analysis Note Case 2 also missed Inform Applicant This is a Normative violation Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision I need to make sure I catch that Looking at the log for Case 2 Yes Inform Applicant is missing entirely between Decision and Close That is a strict violation

Text: Review against Constraints Did I distinguish between Strict and Recommended Yes Did I explain reasons Yes Did I suggest justifications Yes Is the tone appropriate Professional and analytical

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Final Polish Check timestamps and calculations for Case 3 to ensure accuracy Case 3 App Jan 12 0900 Case 3 Credit Check Jan 14 1000 Difference about 49 hours Violates 24h Case 3 Decision Jan 14 1200 Case 3 Inform Jan 16 1500 Difference about 51 hours Violates 48h Self Correction Okay I will stick to the prompt annotation that it is a violation Inform Applicant Decision Jan 14 1200 to Inform Jan 16 1500 is 51 hours greater than 48 hours Violation confirmed
